seo.title: Moving Company Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your moving company. Route upset customers to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Moving Companies
hero.subheading: Move day ends in exhaustion. ReviewFlo texts after the last box lands while relief still outweighs fatigue.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Moving Company Faces

items.heading: Customers collapse on the couch, not on Google
items.body: Unpacking eats the whole week. Reviews are not on their mind.

items.heading: One scratched heirloom becomes a public crusade
items.body: Stress and money turn small damage into headline reviews.

items.heading: Crews are off to the next truck, not follow-up calls
items.body: Dispatch is busy. Nobody closes with a review script at the curb.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Moving Companies

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after unload
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the truck is empty and paperwork is signed.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Strike before memory fades
items.body: Send the same night or next morning while the move is still vivid.

items.heading: Private first for damage claims
items.body: Photos and frustration reach you before a public flame.

items.heading: Local and long-distance
items.body: Same flow for hourly crews and interstate jobs.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, after stressful days where your crew stayed calm and careful.
Private feedback opens a claims path before anger hits Google.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing at pricing built for independent movers, not national van lines.
Send after the service they booked, whether labor-only or full pack.
Ask the employee who experienced the crew, not only HR.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Moving Company Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
